title: Memory Indexer Invariants
summary: Level 3 packet covering the two memory-indexer invariant tracks: Track A closes the E_LINEAGE and candidate_changed save-path failures (canonical-path PE guard + fromScan recheck bypass); Track B enforces permanent index-scope exclusions (z_future, external) and constitutional-tier invariants through a shared SSOT, SQL-layer + post-insert + checkpoint-restore defense-in-depth, a transactional cleanup CLI, and Wave-2 hardening (realpath, walker DoS caps, shared governance-audit helpers). Track B fully live-verified; Track A pending live MCP rescan.
